prompt: A photorealistic wide-angle interior architectural photograph of a luxurious modern lobby flooded with warm late-afternoon sunlight. The space is double-height with an open mezzanine level and clear glass railings above, minimalist cream stone walls, polished gray concrete or stone flooring, and rich reddish-brown wood paneling throughout. On the left side, show a sleek reception desk integrated into a wood-paneled wall, with 2 small lamps on the counter and a subtle recessed niche glowing with warm light. On the right side, create a floor-to-ceiling window wall revealing a soft hazy urban skyline with tall contemporary towers and treetops outside. In the foreground near the windows, place a built-in sunken lounge seating area upholstered in muted salmon, terracotta, and dusty rose tones, including an L-shaped sofa and 1 matching ottoman around a low dark coffee table with a few stacked books. Add 1 small mushroom-shaped table lamp with a glowing cream dome beside the seating. Include multiple indoor plants in long concrete planters along the windows and deeper into the lobby, giving the space a calm biophilic feel. Compose the image from eye level with strong natural light casting long geometric shadows across the floor and walls, emphasizing clean lines, openness, quiet luxury, and a serene high-end hotel or corporate reception atmosphere. Color palette: warm beige, cream, amber sunlight, rose upholstery, dark bronze accents, and natural wood. Ultra-detailed, cinematic, realistic materials, soft atmospheric haze, editorial architectural photography, no people, uncluttered, premium design magazine aesthetic.
